## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Kathy Lam and pivot her initial focus to the Strategy Sprint team.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Initial Focus Pivot:** Kathy Lam's first 90 days will be on the Strategy Sprint team, not the Shared Strategy team as originally planned.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [**Urgency:** This pivot addresses a critical need: Strategy Sprint opt-outs jumped from \~10% to 50% in November, threatening the foundation of new client relationships.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [**Team Lead:** George will be Kathy's direct manager for this period, leading the team's effort to stabilize the process.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [**Onboarding:** Kathy's first week is self-directed learning via Fathom (meeting recordings), Notion (client artifacts), and Linear (onboarding tasks).](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Strategy Sprint Opt-Outs

  - [**Crisis:** Strategy Sprint opt-outs jumped from a healthy \~10% to 50% in November, with more forecast for December.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [**Root Causes:**](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Non-Regrettable Attrition:** Clients who are a poor fit (e.g., toxic POCs like CodeRabbit).](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [**Regrettable Attrition:**](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
          - [Clients who are not a close ICP match.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
          - [Process failures (e.g., inadequate strategy setting).](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [**Goal:** Use the Strategy Sprint to vet mutual fit and set a strong foundation, preventing future delivery issues.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)

### The Solution: Strategy Sprint Process

  - [**Origin:** Created to secure 12-month contracts by de-risking the commitment with a mutual opt-out after an 8-week pilot.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [**Process:** A structured 8-week program to build a strong foundation.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
    1.  [**Deep Dives:** Engage product/technical teams to understand the business beyond a simple kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
    2.  [**Artifact Creation:** Develop foundational documents (e.g., company briefs, writing guidelines).](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
    3.  [**Strategy Alignment:** Use artifacts to build and align on a robust strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
    4.  [**Execution & Calibration:** Begin execution to test the strategy and establish a feedback loop before the full 12-month term.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [**Outcome:** A handoff package for the Delivery team with a clear plan, context, and key contacts, enabling them to "move fast on the right things."](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Kathy's Onboarding & Resources

  - [**First Week:** Self-directed learning to get up to speed.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [**Key Resources:**](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
      - [**Fathom:** Meeting recordings (kickoffs, demos) to see how the team engages clients.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
      - [**Notion:** Client workspaces with internal/external channels and artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
      - [**Linear:** Onboarding task list.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [**Team Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
      - [**Strategy Sprint Team:** Kathy's initial focus.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
      - [**Shared Strategy Team:** A floating team for deep audits and resets, supporting Engagement Managers.](https://fathom.video/share/hZsgET2eswpJK9Ggz5xXFxznuUorgc3L?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
